Test whether a Date matches a parsed cron schedule in host-local time or an IANA timezone.

## Import

```ts
import { matchesCron } from "@graphrefly/ts/sources/browser";
```

## Signature

```ts
function matchesCron(
	schedule: CronSchedule,
	date: Date,
	opts: CronMatchOptions = {},
): boolean
```

| `date` | `Date` | Missing @param date JSDoc. |
